info.longName: Calamos Bitcoin Structured Alt Protection ETF - January

funds_data.description: The fund is an actively managed ETF that seeks to provide investment results, that before taking total fund operating fees and expenses into account, track the positive price return of spot bitcoin up to the stated cap over a specified period of time of approximately one year, while seeking to provide protection against decreases in the price of spot bitcoin of more than 10% over the same Outcome Period. It is non-diversified.
